title: Borrowed Faith
lyricSeed:
I've been leaning on a faith I never owned
Repeating other people's amens
I wore their heaven like a borrowed coat
But it never kept me warm again
Tell me what's mine and what's just handed down
Oh Lord, or whoever's around
I'm giving back these secondhand hymns
And standing cold in what remains
